children.heading: .—Access to Financial Disclosure Reports
children.label: a .—Access to Financial Disclosure Reports
children.text: The Comptroller General shall have access to financial disclosure reports filed under this subchapter for the purposes of carrying out the Comptroller General’s statutory responsibilities.

children.heading: .—Studies
children.label: b .—Studies
children.text: Not later than , and regularly thereafter, the Comptroller General shall conduct a study to determine whether the provisions of this subchapter are being carried out effectively.December 31, 1992
